tables.name: sales
tables.description: Sales transactions including revenue, units sold, region, and product category

columns.name: region
columns.description: Sales region: North, South, East, West

columns.name: product_category
columns.description: Product category: Electronics, Clothing, Food, Books

columns.name: revenue
columns.description: Revenue in USD for the transaction

columns.name: units_sold
columns.description: Number of units sold in the transaction

tables.name: customers
tables.description: Customer master data including location, tier, and signup date

columns.name: state
columns.description: US state abbreviation where customer is located

columns.name: tier
columns.description: Customer loyalty tier: Bronze, Silver, Gold

relationships.description: Each sale belongs to one customer
